untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (rounded bump, head-and-shoulders appearance, double/triple top morphology) requires visual/shape analysis not available in allowed indicators. Volume sequencing logic (high → drop → spike) and price rounding behavior cannot be precisely quantified with single-bar indicators. Conditions translated to approximation using volume ratio surge and upward price movement, but this does not capture the core rounded-top formation geometry.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses vol_ratio_20 > 1.5 to detect volume spike at bump start, and close > prev_close to detect upward jump. Missing: detection of lead-in phase high volume dropoff, explicit rounding behavior over time, and head-and-shoulders/double-top shape confirmation. Exit condition uses bearish cross below SMA_20 as reasonable reversal signal since author provided no exit guidance.
